message:
fix(tests): update truncation test assertions and regenerate gate artifacts

Update branch_edge_failure_coverage test assertions to match the
restored partial-truncation behavior from the prior commit: when the
first line exceeds max_bytes, truncate_head now returns a truncated
prefix (output_lines=1, output_bytes=50, content="x"*50) instead of
empty content.

Regenerate cross-platform reports and full suite gate artifacts with
current timestamps and updated preflight/certification verdicts
reflecting the latest tool and test changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
